objective: Apply the new UI frontend excellence domain to the Codex capsule chat/cockpit app, replacing monolithic presentation with a JOC-grade shell and visible interaction/proof states.
acceptance_gates: User primary chat flow is obvious without internal ION chores.
Send/run actions have clear pending, disabled, duplicate-submit, and error behavior.
Shell uses top/page navigation, icon rails, drawers, main work surface, right inspector/chat, and bottom timeline where appropriate.
Context/capsule/memory visualization shows current, compacted, retrieved, and long-horizon strata without exposing private reasoning.
Mission/session/driver/service status is visible when chat, Codex, MCP, tunnel, or browser automation is involved.
Context selection can show source/file/function/capsule reason and priority when retrieval or capsule memory is involved.
Proof/timeline surface explains slow tool/agent work and validation results.
Build/tests run, and screenshots are captured or marked unrun with reason.
blocked_until: Current UI implementation files are inspected in the active root.
A bounded implementation scope is selected.
Visual validation method is available or explicitly marked unavailable.
non_claims: This next packet is not yet executed.
This packet does not claim current UI repair is complete.
